relayDesk.title: Stuck? Someone here has shipped it.
relayDesk.subtitle: Students, coders, professionals, and educators post real blockers — architecture, career, research, bugs — and the community answers with proof, not theory. Across every sector.

tickets.title: RAG keeps hallucinating on legal docs
tickets.description: Chunking at 512 tokens but citations still drift on multi-clause contracts. Eval set passes — prod fails.
tickets.topReply: Switch to parent-child chunking with overlap on clause boundaries — we documented the fix in the Legal NLP circle.

tickets.title: Tenant data leaking in analytics view
tickets.description: Row-level security works in API but Metabase dashboard shows cross-tenant aggregates for 3 enterprise clients.
tickets.topReply: Check your BI connection pool — shared session vars weren't set per request. Platform guild has a middleware snippet.

tickets.title: Rubrics don't map to LMS outcomes
tickets.description: Canvas exports rubric levels but our competency framework uses 4 tiers — mapping table keeps breaking on import.
tickets.topReply: Use the Cohort Rubric Pack's LTI bridge — it normalizes tier names before export.

tickets.title: Duplicate charges on webhook retry
tickets.description: Stripe webhook fires twice on timeout — our idempotency key is on the client, not the ledger write.
tickets.topReply: Move idempotency to the ledger insert with a unique constraint on (tenant_id, external_id). Sandbox has a working example.

tickets.title: Patient consent scope in FHIR bundle
tickets.description: Consent resource doesn't propagate to Observation reads — HIPAA audit flagged over-broad Practitioner access.
tickets.topReply: Scope Consent.provision dynamically in your authorization layer — Clinical informatics lab shared a SMART pattern.

tickets.title: Purple team tabletop — no exec buy-in
tickets.description: Ran STRIDE workshop but leadership wants ROI metrics before funding quarterly tabletops.
tickets.topReply: Frame as mean-time-to-detect reduction with scenario cost estimates — IR circle has an exec one-pager template.

tickets.title: Rollback desync on high latency
tickets.description: Input replay diverges after 200ms RTT — prediction works locally, fails in EU playtests.
tickets.topReply: Cap prediction window and add input delay scaling — the Rollback Debug Plugin visualizes exactly where frames diverge.

tickets.title: UTM chaos across 4 ad platforms
tickets.description: Meta, Google, TikTok, and email all use different UTM conventions — can't reconcile ROAS in one dashboard.
tickets.topReply: Normalize to a single UTM schema in your webhook layer — Growth guild's sample CSV shows the mapping.

tickets.title: Solar forecast off by 18% vs actual
tickets.description: PVLib model trained on coastal data fails inland — cooperatives losing trust in the forecast API.
tickets.topReply: Retrain with elevation and albedo features — Field Data Union shared inland calibration notebooks.

tickets.title: Policy engine rules conflict at edge cases
tickets.description: Two exclusion rules both fire on flood+rider combo — claims API returns 500 instead of deterministic denial.
tickets.topReply: Order rules by specificity score and add conflict resolution layer — Actuarial study group has decision tree templates.

tickets.title: Live captions 4s behind on mobile
tickets.description: Web player meets WCAG on desktop but iOS Safari buffers caption chunks — users with hearing loss report unusable delay.
tickets.topReply: Stream captions as WebVTT cues with smaller time slices — Live Caption Plugin has a Safari-specific buffer tweak.

tickets.title: Clause extractor biased on non-English contracts
tickets.description: Fine-tuned on US contracts — Spanish and Hindi clauses get mislabeled, hurting A2J users.
tickets.topReply: Augment corpus with multilingual clause labels — Clause Extraction Corpus v2 adds Hindi and Spanish annotations.

tickets.title: Cloud cover ruins NDVI for monsoon season
tickets.description: Sentinel tiles missing 40% of fields in July — cooperatives need gap-fill strategy before harvest decisions.
tickets.topReply: Blend radar + optical with temporal interpolation — NDVI Field Toolkit has a monsoon preset pipeline.

tickets.title: Skills graph query returns empty for IC→Manager path
tickets.description: Cypher path query works in sandbox but production graph missing MANAGES_TO edges for 3 departments.
tickets.topReply: Re-import ontology v3 — MANAGES_TO was renamed to LEADS_TO in the schema migration doc.

tickets.title: Permit portal fails WCAG on mobile forms
tickets.description: Focus trap breaks on multi-step permit form — screen reader users can't complete submission on iOS.
tickets.topReply: Use the Permit Portal API Kit's accessible stepper component — passed audit in 4 municipalities.

tickets.title: Chain-of-custody gap on sample transfer
tickets.description: External courier scan doesn't write to LIMS — 12 samples in regulatory limbo before FDA audit next week.
tickets.topReply: Webhook courier events into custody log with idempotent event IDs — LIMS Chain-of-Custody template has the handler.
